modules.module_title: Mehendi Art ka Parichay aur Suraksha
Henna Paste Banana aur Cone Taiyar Karna

questions.question: Mehendi ka botanical name kya hai?

options.B: Rosa indica

questions.explanation: Mehendi ka botanical name Lawsonia inermis hai, jisse henna powder banta hai.

questions.question: Market mein kaun-kaun se types ki henna available hoti hai?

options.A: Natural Henna, Chemical Henna (Black Henna), Instant Henna
options.B: Red Henna, Green Henna, Blue Henna
options.C: Powder Henna, Liquid Henna, Gel Henna
options.D: Organic Henna, Inorganic Henna, Synthetic Henna

questions.explanation: Market mein primarily Natural Henna, Chemical Henna (Black Henna jisme PPD hota hai), aur Instant Henna available hoti hai.

questions.question: Black Henna mein kaun sa chemical substance hota hai jo skin ke liye harmful ho sakta hai?

options.B: Ascorbic Acid

questions.explanation: Black Henna mein Para-phenylenediamine (PPD) hota hai jo severe allergic reactions aur permanent skin damage kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Mehendi application se pehle skin ko clean karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki design jaldi dry ho jaaye
options.B: Taki paste acche se stick ho aur stain dark aaye

questions.explanation: Clean skin par oil, lotion ya dirt na hone se henna paste acche se lagta hai aur stain bhi dark aata hai.

questions.question: Client ke haathon par mehendi lagane se pehle kaun sa step sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Patch test karna

questions.explanation: Client ke haathon par mehendi lagane se pehle patch test karna zaroori hai, especially agar unhe pehle kabhi allergy hui ho ya skin sensitive ho, PPD wali henna se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Mehendi artist ko kaam karte samay kaun se hygiene practices follow karne chahiye?

options.A: Har client ke baad haath dhona
options.B: Ek hi towel sab clients ke liye use karna
options.C: Apne tools ko disinfect na karna

questions.explanation: Har client ke baad haath dhona aur sanitise karna basic hygiene practice hai jo infections ko फैलने से रोकता है.

questions.question: Mehendi lagane ke liye primary tool kya hai?

options.B: Spoon

questions.explanation: Mehendi lagane ke liye sabse primary aur common tool henna cone hai.

questions.question: Kin conditions mein mehendi application avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Minor cuts ya open wounds par

questions.explanation: Minor cuts ya open wounds par mehendi lagane se infection ka khatra badh sakta hai aur irritation ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Patch test kaise kiya jata hai?

options.B: Kaan ke peeche ya baazu ke andar chhota sa spot lagakar

questions.explanation: Patch test mein, kaan ke peeche ya baazu ke andar ek chhota sa henna spot lagaya jata hai aur 24-48 ghante tak observe kiya jata hai allergy reaction ke liye.

questions.question: Mehendi artist ke workspace ko kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Clean, well-lit aur ventilated

questions.explanation: Ek professional mehendi artist ka workspace clean, well-lit aur ventilated hona chahiye taki hygiene maintain ho aur client comfortable feel kare.

questions.question: Natural henna powder kis plant se banta hai?

options.B: Neem

questions.explanation: Natural henna powder Lawsonia inermis नामक पौधे की पत्तियों से बनता है.

questions.question: Henna paste mein kaun se essential oils add kiye jaate hain deep stain ke liye?

options.A: Lavender oil, Tea Tree oil, Eucalyptus oil
options.B: Mustard oil, Coconut oil, Olive oil
options.C: Sunflower oil, Almond oil, Castor oil

questions.explanation: Lavender, Tea Tree aur Eucalyptus jaise essential oils henna mein terpene alcohol content badhate hain, jo deep aur dark stain ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko mehendi se allergy ho jaaye, toh immediate action kya lena chahiye?

options.B: Turant mehendi hata kar thande paani se dhona aur doctor se consult karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Allergic reaction hone par turant mehendi ko hata kar thande paani se dhona chahiye aur bina der kiye doctor se consult karna chahiye.

questions.question: Aap kaise differentiate karenge natural henna aur chemical (black) henna ko?

options.A: Natural henna ka rang hamesha black hota hai, chemical ka brown
options.B: Natural henna brown/orange rang deti hai, chemical henna turant black rang deti hai aur uski smell harsh hoti hai
options.C: Dono same dikhte hain, koi difference nahi
options.D: Natural henna liquid form mein aati hai, chemical powder form mein

questions.explanation: Natural henna initially orange/brown stain deti hai jo oxidize hokar dark brown hoti hai, jabki chemical henna turant pitch black rang deti hai aur uski chemical smell harsh hoti hai, jo skin ke liye dangerous hai.

questions.question: Used cones aur leftover paste ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Common dustbin mein pheknna
options.C: Sealed bag mein daal kar general waste mein dispose karna

questions.explanation: Used cones aur leftover paste ko ek sealed bag mein daal kar general waste mein dispose karna chahiye taki hygiene maintain rahe aur koi contamination na ho.

questions.question: Mehendi apply karte samay artist ko gloves pehenna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Apni skin ko stain se bachane aur hygiene maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko impress karne ke liye
options.D: Design ko smooth banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Gloves pehenna artist ki skin ko henna stain se bachata hai aur client ke liye bhi hygiene maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Client se mehendi design aur placement ke baare mein discuss karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Taki unki preferences samajh saken aur unhe pasand aane wala design bana saken

questions.explanation: Client se discuss karne se unki pasand, occasion aur budget ke hisaab se best design banaya ja sakta hai, jisse client satisfaction badhti hai.

questions.question: Achhi quality ke henna powder ki pehchan kya hai?

options.A: Bright green colour aur smooth texture
options.B: Dark brown colour aur grainy texture

questions.explanation: Achhi quality ka natural henna powder bright green colour ka hota hai aur uski texture fine aur smooth hoti hai.

questions.question: Henna paste banane ke liye kaun sa liquid commonly use hota hai?

options.B: Lemon juice ya black tea water

questions.explanation: Lemon juice ya black tea water, henna powder ke dye release ko accelerate karte hain aur accha stain dene mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Henna paste mein essential oil dalne ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Stain ko dark aur long-lasting banana

questions.explanation: Essential oils jaise eucalyptus, tea tree, ya lavender mein terpenes hote hain jo henna ke dye molecules ko skin mein penetrate karne mein madad karte hain, jisse stain dark aur long-lasting banta hai.

questions.question: Henna paste ki ideal consistency kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Bahut gaadhi, clay jaisi

questions.explanation: Ideal henna paste smooth aur creamy, toothpaste jaisi honi chahiye, jo cone se easily flow kare aur design mein control de.

questions.question: Dye release process kya hai?

options.B: Henna powder ko pani mein milana
options.C: Henna dye molecules ka powder se nikal kar active hona

questions.explanation: Dye release process mein henna powder ke dye molecules (lawsone) liquid ke contact mein aakar active hote hain aur skin ko stain karne ke liye ready hote hain. Ismein 6-24 ghante lag sakte hain.

questions.question: Henna paste ko mix karne ke baad strain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Lumps aur particles ko remove karne ke liye, taki cone clog na ho
options.C: Paste ka colour change karne ke liye
options.D: Paste ko thanda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Henna paste ko strain karne se usme se saare lumps aur unmixed particles nikal jaate hain, jisse cone clog nahi hota aur smooth lines banti hain.

questions.question: Henna cones banane ke liye kaun sa material best hai?

options.B: Cellophane sheets ya Mylar sheets

questions.explanation: Cellophane sheets ya Mylar sheets transparent aur sturdy hote hain, jisse cone banana aur use karna easy hota hai.

questions.question: Cone ko roll karte samay kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Tip ko bahut bada rakhna
options.C: Cone ko tight aur seamless roll karna, taki paste leak na kare

questions.explanation: Cone ko tight aur seamless roll karna zaroori hai taki paste leak na kare aur design banate samay control bana rahe.

questions.question: Cone ki tip ko kitna cut karna chahiye?

options.A: As per desired line thickness (bahut chhota for fine lines, thoda bada for bolder lines)
options.B: Hamesha bahut bada cut karna

questions.explanation: Cone ki tip ko desired line thickness ke according cut karna chahiye – fine lines ke liye chhota hole aur bolder lines ke liye thoda bada hole.

questions.question: Henna paste ko store karne ka best method kya hai?

options.B: Airtight container mein freeze karna

questions.explanation: Henna paste ko airtight container mein freeze karne se uski shelf life badhti hai aur dye release quality maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Frozen henna paste ki shelf life kitni hoti hai?

options.B: 1-2 hafte

questions.explanation: Properly frozen henna paste 3-6 mahine tak apni dye release quality maintain rakh sakti hai.

questions.question: Kaun se factors henna ke dye release ko affect karte hain?

options.A: Powder quality, liquid ka type, temperature, rest time
options.B: Cone ka colour, artist ka mood
options.C: Client ki skin tone, design ka type

questions.explanation: Henna powder ki quality, paste mein use kiya gaya liquid, surrounding temperature aur dye release ke liye diya gaya rest time, sab dye release ko affect karte hain.

questions.question: Henna paste banate samay common mistake kya ho sakti hai?

options.A: Bahut zyada essential oil daal dena
options.B: Paste ko acche se mix na karna, jisse lumps reh jaate hain
options.C: Paste ko bahut kam time ke liye rest dena

questions.explanation: Bahut zyada essential oil, lumps reh jaana, aur kam rest time, ye sab common mistakes hain jo henna paste ki quality ko affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Freshly made henna paste use karna kyun preferable hai?

options.B: Isse dye release maximum hota hai aur stain best aata hai
options.C: Isse client ko garmi lagti hai
options.D: Isse cone jaldi khali ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Freshly made henna paste mein dye release maximum hota hai, jisse sabse dark aur vibrant stain aata hai.

questions.question: Agar henna paste bahut runny ho jaaye, toh use kaise theek karein?

options.B: Thoda aur henna powder add karke mix karein

questions.explanation: Agar paste bahut runny ho jaaye, toh thoda aur henna powder add karke mix karne se consistency theek ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar henna paste bahut crumbly ho jaaye, toh use kaise theek karein?

options.B: Thoda aur liquid (lemon juice/tea) add karke mix karein

questions.explanation: Agar paste bahut crumbly ho jaaye, toh thoda aur liquid (lemon juice/tea) add karke mix karne se consistency smooth ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Henna paste ki consistency check karne ka sabse accha tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Ek chammach se uthakar dekhna ki woh smoothly gir rahi hai ya nahi

questions.explanation: Ek chammach se paste uthakar dekhna ki woh smoothly aur evenly gir rahi hai ya nahi, ye consistency check karne ka accha tareeka hai.

questions.question: Mehendi design mein 'dot' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf space fill karne ke liye
options.B: Design ko balance aur detail dene ke liye
options.C: Design ko messy banane ke liye
options.D: Yeh koi important element nahi hai

questions.explanation: Dots mehendi designs mein bahut important hote hain. Yeh design ko balance, depth aur detailing dete hain.

questions.question: Straight lines draw karne ke liye cone ko kaise hold karna chahiye?

options.A: Cone ko bahut tight pakadna chahiye
options.B: Cone ko light pressure ke saath pakadna aur steady hand rakhna chahiye
options.C: Cone ko dur se pakadna chahiye
options.D: Cone ko sirf ungliyon se pakadna chahiye

questions.explanation: Straight lines ke liye cone ko light pressure ke saath pakadna aur haath ko steady rakhna zaroori hai, taaki line smooth aur seedhi bane.

questions.question: Paisley motif kis design style mein commonly use hota hai?

options.B: Indian aur Indo-Arabic

questions.explanation: Paisley motif Indian aur Indo-Arabic mehendi designs ka ek bahut hi common aur traditional element hai.

questions.question: 'Jaali' pattern kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek intricate mesh ya net-like pattern

questions.explanation: Jaali pattern ek intricate mesh ya net-like design hota hai jo filler ke roop mein ya pure haath par banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Mehendi design ki placement karte samay kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Client ki preference, body part ka shape aur overall balance

questions.explanation: Design placement karte samay client ki preference, haath ya pair ka shape aur design ka overall balance dekhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Design mein symmetry aur balance maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Isse design jaldi complete hota hai
options.B: Isse design aesthetically pleasing aur professional lagta hai
options.C: Isse paste kam use hota hai
options.D: Isse client ko confusion hoti hai

questions.explanation: Symmetry aur balance design ko aesthetically pleasing, organized aur professional look dete hain.

questions.question: Cone pressure control kaise improve kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Regular practice se, light se heavy pressure adjust karte hue

questions.explanation: Cone pressure control regular practice se hi improve hota hai, jismein aap light se heavy pressure adjust karna seekhte hain, jisse fine aur bold lines banti hain.

questions.question: Mehendi lagate samay 'speed control' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Hamesha bahut dheere lagana
options.C: Design ke hisaab se speed adjust karna, smooth aur clean lines ke liye

questions.explanation: Speed control ka matlab hai design ke complexity aur type ke hisaab se apni speed adjust karna, taaki lines smooth, clean aur evenly spaced banein.

questions.question: Indian Mehendi designs mein kaun se common motifs use hote hain?

options.B: Floral, paisley, peacock, human figures

questions.explanation: Indian Mehendi designs mein floral patterns, paisleys, peacocks aur kabhi-kabhi human figures jaise traditional motifs commonly use hote hain.

questions.question: Arabic Mehendi designs ki kya khaas baat hai?

options.B: Bold, spacious aur floral-vine patterns

questions.explanation: Arabic Mehendi designs bold, spacious hote hain aur inmein bade floral motifs, leaves aur vines ka use hota hai, jo zyada skin dikhate hain.

questions.question: Cone ko sahi tareeke se kaise pakdein?

options.B: Jaise pen pakadte hain, index finger aur thumb ke beech mein, aur baaki fingers support ke liye

questions.explanation: Cone ko pen ki tarah pakadna chahiye, index finger aur thumb ke beech mein, aur baaki fingers support ke liye use karni chahiye, jisse control accha rehta hai.

questions.question: Mehendi design banana kahan se shuru karna chahiye?

options.B: Hamesha wrist se shuru karna
options.C: Top ya center se shuru karna jahan se design spread ho sake
options.D: Kahin se bhi shuru kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Mehendi design ko generally top ya center se shuru karna chahiye, jahan se aap design ko evenly spread kar saken aur smudging se bach saken.

questions.question: Do design elements ko smoothly connect karne ke liye kaun si technique use karte hain?

options.B: Filler patterns, vines ya small dots ka use karke
options.D: Sirf ek bada dot laga kar

questions.explanation: Do design elements ko smoothly connect karne ke liye filler patterns, delicate vines ya small dots ka use kiya jaata hai, jisse design cohesive lagta hai.

questions.question: Practice ke liye kis surface ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Glass sheet, plastic sheet ya practice hand par

questions.explanation: Practice ke liye glass sheet, plastic sheet ya practice hand sabse acche options hain, jin par aap bar-bar designs bana sakte hain aur apni technique improve kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Clean aur crisp lines banane ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Sahi consistency ka paste, steady hand aur controlled pressure

questions.explanation: Clean aur crisp lines ke liye sahi consistency ka paste, ek steady hand aur controlled pressure bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Mehendi lagate samay smudges se kaise bachen?

options.A: Client ko baar-baar haath hilane ko kehna
options.B: Apne haath ko client ki skin se dur rakhna aur support ke liye cushion ya block use karna
options.C: Wet cloth se baar-baar saaf karna

questions.explanation: Smudges se bachne ke liye apne haath ko client ki skin se dur rakhna chahiye aur support ke liye cushion ya block ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Design mein 'border' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Design ko confine karna aur use ek defined look dena
options.B: Design ko incomplete dikhana

questions.explanation: Border design ko confine karta hai, use ek defined look deta hai aur overall design ko complete karta hai.

questions.question: Bridal Mehendi designs ki kya khaasiyat hoti hai?

options.B: Intricate, dense aur full coverage (haath aur pairon par)

questions.explanation: Bridal Mehendi designs bahut intricate, dense aur full coverage wale hote hain, jo dulhan ke haath aur pairon par lagaye jaate hain aur shubh maane jaate hain.

questions.question: Arabic aur Indian Mehendi styles mein main difference kya hai?

options.A: Arabic designs dense hote hain, Indian designs minimal
options.B: Arabic designs bold aur spacious hote hain, Indian designs intricate aur full coverage
options.C: Arabic designs sirf flowers hote hain, Indian designs sirf dots
options.D: Dono mein koi difference nahi hai

questions.explanation: Arabic designs bold aur spacious hote hain, aksar floral-vine patterns ke saath, jabki Indian designs intricate, dense aur full coverage wale hote hain.

questions.question: Mehendi mein 'shading' kaise ki jaati hai?

options.B: Cone ko halka dabakar aur paste ko spread karke ya light pressure se outline fill karke

questions.explanation: Shading ke liye, cone ko halka dabakar paste ko spread kiya jaata hai ya outline ke andar light pressure se fill kiya jaata hai, jisse depth aur dimension aati hai.

questions.question: Intricate detailing ke liye kaun se cone tip size ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Medium hole

questions.explanation: Intricate detailing jaise jaali, tiny flowers ya fine lines ke liye extra fine hole wali cone tip ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Negative space designs kya hote hain?

options.A: Design jo bahut zyada paste se bane hote hain
options.B: Designs jismein skin ka un-stained area design ka part banta hai
options.D: Designs jo kharab ho gaye hon

questions.explanation: Negative space designs mein, skin ka un-stained area design ke roop mein dikhta hai, jo design ko modern aur unique look deta hai.

questions.question: Indo-Arabic Mehendi style kya hai?

options.B: Sirf Arabic designs
options.C: Indian aur Arabic design elements ka fusion

questions.explanation: Indo-Arabic style Indian designs ki intricacies aur Arabic designs ki boldness aur spaciousness ka ek khoobsurat fusion hai.

questions.question: Finger tips par mehendi lagate samay kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Fingers ki natural curve aur length ko complement karna

questions.explanation: Finger tips par design banate samay fingers ki natural curve aur length ko complement karna chahiye, taki design proportionate lage.

questions.question: Foot Mehendi designs banate samay kya challenges aa sakte hain?

options.A: Foot ka shape, client ki comfort aur design ka visibility
options.B: Paste jaldi sukh jaana

questions.explanation: Foot Mehendi mein foot ke uneven shape, client ki comfort (kyunki unhe long time tak baithna padta hai) aur design ki visibility ko manage karna challenging ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Mandala design kya hota hai?

options.B: Circular, symmetrical design jo center se shuru hota hai

questions.explanation: Mandala ek circular aur symmetrical design hota hai jo center se shuru hota hai aur bahar ki taraf failta hai, jismein intricate patterns hote hain.

questions.question: Peacock motif banate samay kis part par zyada focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Feathers ki detailing aur spread par

questions.explanation: Peacock motif mein feathers ki intricate detailing aur unka spread bahut important hota hai, jo design ko khoobsurat banata hai.

questions.question: Portrait Mehendi designs banana kitna difficult hota hai?

options.B: Medium difficulty
options.C: Extremely difficult, high level of skill aur precision chahiye

questions.explanation: Portrait Mehendi designs extremely difficult hote hain, jinmein high level of skill, precision aur artistic ability chahiye hoti hai faces aur expressions ko capture karne ke liye.

questions.question: Jewellery-style Mehendi designs ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: Light, delicate aur jewellery ki tarah dikhne wale designs (bracelets, rings)

questions.explanation: Jewellery-style Mehendi designs light, delicate hote hain aur real jewellery jaise bracelets, rings, ya anklets ki tarah dikhte hain.

questions.question: Modern abstract Mehendi designs mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Unconventional shapes, lines aur patterns, no specific theme

questions.explanation: Modern abstract Mehendi designs mein unconventional shapes, lines aur patterns shamil hote hain, jinka koi specific traditional theme nahi hota, aur yeh experimental hote hain.

questions.question: Multiple cones ka use kisliye kiya jaata hai advanced designs mein?

options.A: Sirf time waste karne ke liye
options.B: Different paste consistencies ya colours (body art glitter/gel) use karne ke liye, shading aur depth ke liye
options.C: Ek hi design ko double karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Advanced designs mein multiple cones ka use different paste consistencies (jaise fine lines ke liye patla, filling ke liye gaadha) ya body art glitter/gel colours use karne ke liye kiya jaata hai, jisse design mein shading aur depth aati hai.

questions.question: Design mein heavy aur light elements ko kaise balance karte hain?

options.B: Sirf light elements bana kar
options.C: Heavy (dense) elements ko light (spacious) elements ke saath contrast karke

questions.explanation: Heavy (dense) elements ko light (spacious) elements ke saath contrast karke design mein visual balance aur harmony create ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Fine lines banane ke liye paste ki consistency kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Thodi patli aur smooth, jisse cone se easily flow kare

questions.explanation: Fine lines banane ke liye paste ki consistency thodi patli aur smooth honi chahiye, jisse woh cone se bina rukawat ke flow kare aur crisp lines banein.

questions.question: Advanced designs mein speed aur precision improve karne ka best tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Daily practice aur challenging designs par kaam karna

questions.explanation: Advanced designs mein speed aur precision improve karne ke liye daily practice aur challenging designs par kaam karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client consultation mein sabse pehle kya discuss karna chahiye?

options.B: Client ki preferences (design style, coverage, occasion) aur koi allergies ya skin conditions

questions.explanation: Client consultation mein sabse pehle unki preferences, occasion aur koi bhi potential allergies ya skin conditions discuss karni chahiye, taki unhe safe aur satisfactory experience mile.

questions.question: Mehendi design ki price estimate karte samay kin factors ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Design ki complexity, coverage area, time taken aur material cost

questions.explanation: Price estimate karte samay design ki complexity, kitna area cover hoga, kitna time lagega aur material cost, in sab factors ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Naye client ke liye patch test kab karna chahiye?

options.B: Design lagane se 24-48 ghante pehle

questions.explanation: Naye client ke liye hamesha patch test design lagane se 24-48 ghante pehle karna chahiye, taki kisi bhi allergic reaction ka pata chal sake.

questions.question: Mehendi lagane se pehle client ko kya advice deni chahiye?

options.B: Skin ko clean aur oil-free rakhein
options.C: Hair removal mehendi ke baad karein

questions.explanation: Client ko advice deni chahiye ki woh apni skin ko clean aur oil-free rakhein aur hair removal mehendi se pehle karwa lein, taki stain acche se aaye.

questions.question: Mehendi dry hone ke baad kaun sa mixture lagana chahiye for dark stain?

options.B: Sugar aur lemon juice ka mixture

questions.explanation: Mehendi dry hone ke baad sugar aur lemon juice ka mixture lagane se paste skin par chipka rehta hai, jisse dye skin mein acche se penetrate karta hai aur dark stain aata hai.

questions.question: Mehendi hatane ke baad kitni der tak paani se bachna chahiye?

options.B: Kam se kam 12-24 ghante

questions.explanation: Mehendi hatane ke baad kam se kam 12-24 ghante tak paani se bachna chahiye, taki dye ko skin mein oxidize hone ka poora time mile aur stain dark ho.

questions.question: Mehendi hatane ke baad stain ko dark karne ke liye kaun sa oil lagana chahiye?

options.A: Mustard oil, coconut oil ya Vicks VapoRub
options.B: Cooking oil

questions.explanation: Mehendi hatane ke baad mustard oil, coconut oil ya Vicks VapoRub lagane se garmi paida hoti hai jo stain ko dark karne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Mehendi stain jaldi fade hone ke kya reasons ho sakte hain?

options.B: Frequent hand washing, swimming, ya harsh chemicals ka use

questions.explanation: Frequent hand washing, swimming, harsh chemicals ka use ya excessive exfoliation se mehendi stain jaldi fade ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko mehendi se skin irritation ho, toh kya advise denge?

options.B: Turant paani se dho kar, anti-itch cream lagane aur doctor se consult karne ki advice denge

questions.explanation: Skin irritation hone par turant mehendi hata kar, affected area ko paani se dho kar, anti-itch cream lagane aur doctor se consult karne ki advice deni chahiye.

questions.question: Kin circumstances mein ek mehendi artist ko client ko service dene se mana kar dena chahiye?

options.A: Client ki skin par open wounds, rashes ya infections hon
options.B: Client ki pasand ka design na ho
options.C: Client bahut zyada baatein kar raha ho

questions.explanation: Agar client ki skin par open wounds, rashes, infections ya koi adverse reaction ka risk ho, toh service dene se mana kar dena chahiye.

questions.question: Client ko aftercare instructions clearly explain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Taki unhe best possible stain mile aur koi problem na ho
options.D: Taki aapko baar-baar call na karein

questions.explanation: Clear aftercare instructions dene se client ko best possible stain milta hai aur woh kisi bhi problem se bach sakte hain, jisse client satisfaction badhti hai.

questions.question: Finished mehendi work ki photographs lena kyun helpful hai?

options.A: Sirf social media par post karne ke liye
options.B: Apne portfolio ke liye aur future reference ke liye
options.C: Client ko tang karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Finished mehendi work ki high-quality photographs lena apne portfolio ko build karne aur future clients ko apna kaam dikhane ke liye bahut helpful hai.

questions.question: Client feedback lena kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Apni mistakes ko chupane ke liye
options.B: Apni services ko improve karne aur client satisfaction ko judge karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf positive reviews collect karne ke liye
options.D: Client ka time waste karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client feedback lena apni services ko improve karne, client satisfaction ko judge karne aur future clients ke liye trust build karne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ko henna ke dye release process ke baare mein samjhana kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki woh jaldi mehendi hata dein
options.B: Taki woh initial light colour se ghabrayen nahi aur aftercare instructions follow karein
options.C: Taki woh aur tips na maange
options.D: Taki woh aapki knowledge par doubt karein

questions.explanation: Client ko dye release process samjhane se woh initial light orange colour se ghabrayenge nahi aur aftercare instructions ko properly follow karenge, jisse unhe desired dark stain milega.

questions.question: Agar client design se dissatisfied ho, toh use kaise handle karein?

options.B: Unki baat sunein, sorry kahein aur solution offer karein (jaise touch-up, discount ya future service)

questions.explanation: Client dissatisfaction ko calmly handle karna chahiye. Unki baat sunein, sorry kahein aur ek solution offer karein, jisse unka trust maintain rahe.

questions.question: Pregnant clients ko mehendi lagate samay kya special care leni chahiye?

options.B: Sirf natural henna use karein, essential oils avoid karein aur unki comfort ka dhyaan rakhein
options.D: Unhe bahut der tak baithne ko kahein

questions.explanation: Pregnant clients ke liye sirf natural henna use karni chahiye, strong essential oils avoid karne chahiye aur unki comfort ka poora dhyaan rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek mehendi artist ke liye portfolio banana kyun important hai?

options.B: Apna best work showcase karne aur naye clients ko attract karne ke liye
options.C: Dusre artists ko copy karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek strong portfolio aapka best work showcase karta hai aur naye clients ko aapki skill aur style dikhata hai, jo business grow karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Social media ka use mehendi business ke liye kaise kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf personal photos post karne ke liye
options.B: Apna work showcase karne, engagement badhane aur naye clients tak pahunchne ke liye
options.C: Dusre artists ko criticize karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Social media platforms jaise Instagram aur Facebook par apna kaam post karke, tutorials share karke aur client engagement badhakar naye clients tak pahuncha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Apni mehendi services ke liye pricing strategy kaise develop karein?

options.A: Sirf competitors ki prices dekh kar
options.B: Apni skill level, experience, material cost, time taken aur market demand ko consider karke
options.D: Randomly koi bhi price rakh dena

questions.explanation: Pricing strategy banate samay apni skill level, experience, material cost, time taken, market demand aur competitors ki prices ko consider karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client ko achhi customer service dene mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Friendly hona, unki baat sunna, comfortable environment provide karna aur professional behave karna

questions.explanation: Achhi customer service mein client ke saath friendly aur respectful hona, unki baat sunna, comfortable environment provide karna aur professional behave karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Ek professional mehendi artist ki kya pehchan hai?

options.B: Cleanliness, punctuality, good communication skills aur high-quality work

questions.explanation: Ek professional mehendi artist apni cleanliness, punctuality, good communication skills aur high-quality work se pehchana jaata hai.

questions.question: Mehendi artist ko apne tools aur workspace ki hygiene kaise maintain karni chahiye?

options.A: Hafte mein ek baar saaf karna
options.B: Har client ke baad tools ko clean aur sanitize karna, aur workspace ko tidy rakhna
options.C: Jab mann kare tab saaf karna

questions.explanation: Har client ke baad tools ko clean aur sanitize karna aur workspace ko tidy rakhna infection se bachne aur professional image maintain karne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Inventory management mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Henna powder, essential oils, cones aur other supplies ko track karna aur replenish karna

questions.explanation: Inventory management mein henna powder, essential oils, cones aur anya supplies ko track karna, unki expiry dates check karna aur time par replenish karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Mehendi business mein legal aur ethical considerations kya hain?

options.B: Sirf natural henna use karna, health and safety regulations follow karna aur client consent lena

questions.explanation: Legal aur ethical considerations mein sirf natural henna use karna, health and safety regulations follow karna, client consent lena aur unhe sahi information dena shamil hai.

questions.question: Appointments book karte samay kya information leni chahiye?

options.B: Client ka naam, contact details, preferred date/time, design type aur approximate duration

questions.explanation: Appointments book karte samay client ka naam, contact details, preferred date/time, design type aur approximate duration leni chahiye, taki scheduling smooth ho.

questions.question: Naye client base build karne ke liye kya strategies use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Word-of-mouth referrals, social media marketing, local events mein participate karna aur collaboration
options.C: Apne dosto ko hi service dena

questions.explanation: Naye client base build karne ke liye word-of-mouth referrals, active social media marketing, local events mein participate karna aur dusre businesses ke saath collaboration karna helpful hota hai.

questions.question: Client ko additional services (upselling) kaise offer kar sakte hain?

options.B: Unki needs ke hisaab se related services (jaise glitter, aftercare kit) politely suggest karke
options.C: Unki service ko jaldi khatam karke

questions.explanation: Client ko additional services jaise glitter, aftercare kit, ya extended designs unki needs aur budget ke hisaab se politely suggest karke upselling ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Competition ko kaise handle karein?

options.B: Apni uniqueness par focus karein, quality improve karein aur excellent customer service provide karein
options.C: Apni prices bahut kam kar dein

questions.explanation: Competition ko handle karne ke liye apni uniqueness par focus karna chahiye, apni quality aur skills ko improve karna chahiye aur excellent customer service provide karni chahiye.

questions.question: Ek successful mehendi artist ke liye continuous learning kyun important hai?

options.B: Naye trends, techniques aur styles ke saath updated rehne ke liye
options.C: Apni skills ko kharab karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Continuous learning se artist naye trends, techniques aur styles ke saath updated rehta hai, jisse woh apne clients ko best aur latest designs offer kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Mehendi artist ka professional appearance kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Clean, tidy aur presentable

questions.explanation: Ek professional mehendi artist ka appearance clean, tidy aur presentable hona chahiye, jisse client par positive impression padta hai.

questions.question: Apni personal brand identity kaise create karein?

options.A: Sirf dusre artists ko copy karke
options.B: Apni unique style, logo, consistent branding aur online presence se
options.D: Koi brand identity ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Apni personal brand identity apni unique style, ek recognizable logo, consistent branding across all platforms aur strong online presence se create ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Business records (appointments, expenses, income) maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Business performance track karne, tax purposes aur future planning ke liye
options.C: Clients ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Detailed business records maintain karne se aap apni business performance track kar sakte hain, tax purposes ke liye helpful hota hai aur future business planning mein madad milti hai.
